privileged_info_summary: The task involves updating a synthetic EPCRA Tier II facility record (Green Valley Water Facility, fictional facility not found in public records) with three chemical changes: (1) Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) maximum daily amount from 20,000 to 60,000 lbs, (2) Fluorosilic Acid (CAS 16961-83-4) average daily amount from 20,000 to 55,000 lbs, (3) adding Sodium Hypochlorite (CAS 7681-52-9) as a new liquid non-EHS chemical. All three CAS numbers are real chemicals verified against authoritative chemical databases. CRITICAL FINDING: The task metadata and verifier contain incorrect EPCRA Tier II amount code ranges. The task claims code 07 = 50,000-99,999 lbs, but EPA regulations specify code 07 = 25,000-49,999 lbs. The values 60,000 and 55,000 actually fall into codes 08 (50,000-74,999) or 09 (75,000-99,999), not code 07. The source XML data file exists and contains Green Valley Water Facility with Chlorine and Fluorosilic Acid; Sodium Hypochlorite is not present and must be added.
